wine_schools.name: Ecole des Vins d'Alsace
wine_schools.address: 12 Avenue de la Foire aux Vins, 68000 Colmar, France
wine_schools.description: Official Alsace wine school operated by CIVA at the Maison des Vins. Workshops on grape varieties, terroir and Grand Cru study, plus multi-day certified courses for trade and consumers.
wine_schools.price_range: Tasting workshops from around EUR 30; multi-day certified courses several hundred euros

verified.address_quoted: 12 avenue de la Foire-Aux-Vins BP 11217 68012 Colmar Cedex France

wine_schools.name: Academie Internationale des Vins en Alsace
wine_schools.description: One of the few WSET-approved providers in France, AIVA in Landersheim near Strasbourg runs WSET Levels 1, 2 and 3 in wine and spirits with Diego Bonnel as the lead instructor.
wine_schools.price_range: WSET Level 1 EUR 275; WSET Level 2 EUR 670; WSET Level 3 multi-day programme

wine_schools.name: Musee des Vins d'Alsace Tasting Workshops
wine_schools.address: 12 Place de la Cathedrale, 68000 Colmar, France
wine_schools.description: Cathedral-square wine museum with audio-guided tasting workshops in seven languages plus dedicated initiation classes on Riesling, Gewurztraminer and Pinot Noir from the Domaine Viticole de Colmar.
courses_offered: Initiation flight: Riesling, Gewurztraminer, Pinot Noir
wine_schools.price_range: Adult EUR 15, reduced EUR 13, children EUR 9

wine_schools.name: Le Cercle des Aromes Tasting School
wine_schools.description: Sommelier-led tasting workshops in Le Cercle des Aromes wine bar with themed Grand Cru, Cremant and biodynamic-Alsace classes, plus food-and-wine pairing evenings.

wine_schools.name: Cave Vinicole de Beblenheim Tasting Workshops
wine_schools.description: Cooperative cellar in 15th-century buildings with hundred-year oak barrels, running guided tastings of single-cru Rieslings and the gold-medal Cuvee Prestige Cremant d'Alsace.

wine_schools.name: Domaines Schlumberger Wine and Cheese Workshop
wine_schools.description: Saturday wine-and-cheese pairing class at Domaines Schlumberger's Guebwiller cellar, pairing the four Guebwiller Grand Crus with Alsace and Vosges artisanal cheeses.
courses_offered: Adventure visit with Grand Cru flight
wine_schools.price_range: Wine and Cheese EUR 25; Prestige EUR 25; Adventure EUR 50

wine_schools.name: Famille Hugel Tasting Class
wine_schools.address: 3 Rue de la 1ere Armee, 68340 Riquewihr, France
wine_schools.description: Pre-booked tasting workshops at Famille Hugel's Riquewihr cellars, walking through 12 generations of dry Riesling and a vendanges tardives masterclass.
courses_offered: Heritage cellar visit with guided tasting
Vendanges Tardives and Grossi Laue masterclass

verified.address_quoted: 3 rue de la 1ere Armee Francaise, 68340 Riquewihr
